reasoning: The market price for this prediction is 0.02. Achieving 16 consecutive weeks at #1 on the Billboard 200 chart is historically extremely rare. Only a very small handful of albums have ever done this (e.g., the Titanic soundtrack, Thriller). Recent blockbuster albums like Morgan Wallen's "One Thing at a Time" and Taylor Swift's "The Tortured Poets Department" fell just short of this mark (both reaching 15 consecutive weeks before dropping). Therefore, a 2% estimate is very reasonable and accurately reflects the historical base rate and current market consensus.
